audit_items.proof_trace: main.h is a header file containing struct definitions, function declarations, and three static inline predicate functions; exhaustive grep confirms zero dynamic allocation calls (kmalloc, kzalloc, kcalloc, vmalloc, etc.) anywhere in the file. The three inline functions (nfp_flower_internal_port_can_offload, nfp_flower_is_merge_flow, nfp_flower_is_supported_bridge) only read existing state and return bool — no memory is ever allocated. The assertion forall alloc(p) in main.h: exists free(p) on all paths is vacuously satisfied.
